aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to a lack of structured data and conversational content, despite having strong NAP consistency and a good GBP rating.
quick_wins: Create an FAQ page with common HVAC and appliance repair questions

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but posts and Q&A sections could be more active.
critical_issues: Lack of engagement in the Q&A section

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Regularly audit NAP citations to ensure ongoing accuracy

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common repair processes

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of schema markup and conversational content
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'HVAC repair in Austin' and 'appliance repair near me'
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Adding LocalBusiness and FAQ schema to key service pages
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Positioning as the expert through detailed how-to guides and media coverage

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by optimizing for answer engines and AI search.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they are missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, making it less likely for AI assistants to cite them.
agency_pitch.solution: Implement structured data, create FAQ content, and optimize for conversational queries to enhance AI visibility.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, and waiting means losing market share to them.
